description: Cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in index.php in (1) Fastilo 2.0 and (2) Open Solution Quick.Cart 2.0 allows remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via the p parameter.  NOTE: some of these details are obtained from third party information.
